titles.title: Not by Power, Not by Might

properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v1 v1 v2 v4 v1 v1 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Not by power, Not by might, But by My Spirit, Says the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The weapons of our warfare Are not of this world They are mighty through God Mighty through God The power of His mercy And the power of His love, They are stronger than all Stronger than all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As we worship in unity Jesus the Lord, Victory comes in His name By His Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As we worship in unity Jesus the Lord Victory comes in His name By His Word

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: By My Spirit, says the Lord, By My Spirit, says the Lord, By My Spirit, says the Lord.
